conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution independent of molar mass for PEG-MME
conditions.evidence_text: PEG-monomethyl ethers elute on the Nucleosil 100-5 OH column in 77.01 wt-% acetone at the CAP, while PCL elutes in SEC mode. Under these conditions, CL–EO diblock copolymers with PEG-MME 2000 as initiator and different monomer-to-initiator ratios elute in SEC mode, while different PEG-MMEs elute at the same position, regardless their molar mass
conditions.notes: LCCC measurements were performed at a temperature of 25.0 C. Mobile phase composition controlled by density measurement.
conditions.physical_address: Central Polymer Lab–Molecular Characteristics (CePOL/MC), Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria

conditions.analyte_polymer: PCL-ME (n=2, n=5, n=15, n=20), PEG-MME 2000, PEG-MME 5000, EO-CL diblock copolymers
conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution independent of molar mass for PCL-ME
conditions.evidence_text: PCL-MEs elute at 2.8 mL, regardless their degree of polymerization. The peaks of PEG-MME and PCLME are well separated from each other. Obviously, PEG elutes in SEC mode
conditions.notes: LCCC measurements were performed at a temperature of 25.0 C. Mobile phase composition controlled by density measurement.
conditions.physical_address: Central Polymer Lab–Molecular Characteristics (CePOL/MC), Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria

conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution independent of molar mass for CL block
conditions.evidence_text: LCCC of EO–CL block copolymers with different degree of polymerization (synthesized with BF3�Et2O as catalyst and PEG-MME 2000 as initiator), as obtained on the Jordi column in 80.92% THF
conditions.notes: Specific composition for BF3-catalyzed samples. The text notes the block copolymer elutes just like the initiator (at the CAP).
conditions.physical_address: Central Polymer Lab–Molecular Characteristics (CePOL/MC), Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria

conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution independent of molar mass for CL block
conditions.evidence_text: LCCC of EO–CL block copolymers with different monomer-toinitiator ratio (synthesized with NaH as catalyst and PEG-MME 5000 as initiator), as obtained on the Jordi column in 80.98% THF
conditions.physical_address: Central Polymer Lab–Molecular Characteristics (CePOL/MC), Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria

conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution independent of molar mass for CL block
conditions.evidence_text: A Spherisorb ODS2 column was used at the CAP for CL, which was found to be in THF–water containing 80.48 wt-% THF as mobile phase.
conditions.notes: Semipreparative LCCC used for fractionation prior to MALDI-TOF-MS.
conditions.physical_address: Central Polymer Lab–Molecular Characteristics (CePOL/MC), Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria
